Gokul Hospital info@gokulmlifescience.in | info@gokulhospital.in +91-9904399043 | 7900108108 24 x 7 Emergency for 365 Days +91-9904399043    / +91-7900108108 Vidhyanagar main road   Kuvadva road Home About Doctors Departments Trauma, Neuro Surgery & Neurology Critical Care Cardiology Endovascular Interventional Radiology Neurology Pediatric Neurology Pediatric & Pediatric Critical Care Spine, Orthopaedic & Joint Retirement Urology Nephrology General & Laproscopic Surgery ENT Surgeon Dental Neurophysiology and Physiotherapy Radiology Dietitians Gastroenterology & Hepetology Facilities Health Checkup Government Schemes & Cashless Facilities Corporate Tie up Gallery Press Release / News Contact Appiontment Home About Doctors Departments Trauma, Neuro Surgery & Neurology Critical Care Cardiology Endovascular Interventional Radiology Neurology Pediatric Neurology Pediatric & Pediatric Critical Care Spine, Orthopaedic & Joint Retirement Urology Nephrology General & Laproscopic Surgery ENT Surgeon Dental Neurophysiology and Physiotherapy Radiology Dietitians Gastroenterology & Hepetology Facilities Health Checkup Government Schemes & Cashless Facilities Corporate Tie up Gallery Press Release / News Contact Our Vision To continually improve the health of the communities we serve in the spirit of hope, compassion, respect and dignity. High quality medical services which help improve health and wellbeing through the provision of a professional, safe, caring and affordable service. Our Benefits High-quality staff Peer support from patients Multi-specialty health care Patient Care 24 x 7 Emergancy Our Mission To treat each and every patient, with utmost courtesy and respect, and to provide each patient with the best medical care possible with affordable rates, within the available resources of the hospital without compromising on quality. Your browser does not support the video tag. MESSAGE FROM CHAIRMAN Greetings!!! Dear all Gokulites, Welcome to the Gokul Hospitals. We are the largest hospital chain in the region, serving the society since 1989. Our Motto is “Excellence – Truthfulness – Transparency" and now you all are the part of it. So let's take a pride of serving the society for a noble cause with high gratitude. Let us take a pledge of serving the humanity with respect and quality to make them free from suffering and pain. Again I would like to thank all of you for putting your trust on “GOKUL". – Dr. Prakash Modha Departments CARDIOLOGY & CARDIO SURGERY NEUROLOGY & STROKE UNIT HIGH RISK PREGNANCY PEDIATRIC INTENSIVIST CRITICAL CARE GASTROENTROLOGY AND HEPATOLOGY GENERAL & LAPAROSCOPIC SURGERY NEURO AND SPINE SURGERY ORTHOPADEIC AND JOINT REPLACEMENT MAXILLOFACIAL SURGERY UROLOGY PSYCHIATRY Testimonials નમસ્કાર,હું સંજય મોઢવાડીયા, પોરબંદર થી.દાદા ( સવાભાઈ ) ની બાયપાસ સર્જરી સફળ રહી. અને હવે ખુબ જ સારી એવી રીકવરી પણ આવી રહી છે. ગઇ કાલે બપોરે અમને રજા મળી. આપની હોસ્પિટલનું સંચાલન, સ્વચ્છતા અને સેફ્ટી અદ્વીતીય છે.ગોકુલ હોસ્પિટલ ના સમગ્ર સ્ટાફ, તમામ ડોક્ટર્સ, માનનીય મનીષ મેસવાણી સાહેબ, માંડણકાકા તથા સૌના સંચાલક એવા આપ, આપ સૌ નો હું ખુબ ખુબ આભાર માનું છું. -Sanjay Modhvadiya Porbandar Gokul Hospital Directors Book Your Appointment Gokul Hospitals is always looking to make things easier for you. Our aim is to provide our patients with the best medical facilities, constant care, and reliable support. Address Vidhyanagar Main Road.
Kuvadava Road. 24 x 7 Emergency for 365 Days Appointment +91 99097 88588 +91 75749 70691 +91 88663 83108 Emergency +91 99043 99043 +91 79001 08108 Patient Name : * Mobile Number : * Location : * Vidhyanagar Main Road, Rajkot. As Dr. Prakash Modha being a first neurosergeon of the region started his efforts with a tag of ‘Gokul hospital & trauma centre’ and that is the reason today also it is said “neuro means Dr. Prakash Modha”.
